title: Provenance Record
description: Tracks a single data access or transformation event in the provenance DAG. Derived from provenance_server.py ProvenanceRecord and DataSource fields. Supports SHA-256 fingerprinting for data integrity verification.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this provenance record (UUID v4).

source_id.description: Reference to the DataSource being accessed.

action.description: Operation performed on the data source.

actor_id.description: Identifier of the actor performing the action.

actor_role.description: Role of the actor from the 6-actor model.

tool_call.description: MCP tool invocation that triggered this access event.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest fingerprint of the input data.

output_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest fingerprint of the output data.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the access event.

origin_server.description: MCP server that owns the data source.

description.description: Human-readable description of the data access event.

metadata.description: Additional properties specific to the source type.

examples.description: Robot agent read de-identified patient resource for procedure planning
